generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T SALIX NIGER. Salix niger, L. Natural order , Salicaceæ. Common name , Black willow. Authority. E. D. Wright, M.D., Amer. Hom. Obs., 1875, p. 177, took 1/2 ounce tincture in a day. ► Gums sore (first day). ► Looseness of the bowels (first day). ► Muscles sore and lame (second day). ► Skin on the temples sore to the touch (second day). ► Disposition to lie down and sleep (second day). ► Fever (second day).
